name: stylus-nexus
description: Stylus Nexus plugins for Claude Code + Codex.

plugins.name: work-plan
plugins.description: Track-aware daily planning over GitHub issues. Shared tracks (git-synced .work-plan/) optionally pinned to a canonical plan branch (plan-branch), AI clustering (group/auto-triage), coverage, plan-status doc liveness, batched GraphQL fetches. Includes a theme-aware, accessible VS Code viewer — sidebar tree with a visibility×tier exposure badge, Mermaid dependency graph, per-milestone filter, and read/write with confirmation guards.
